decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-26. The specific two-bug retry helper (attempt off-by-one plus uncapped backoff), the injected sleep recorder, and the exact delay-sequence assertions are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

fail_to_pass.name: succeeds_last_attempt
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^succeeds on the last allowed attempt$' tests/retry.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: caps_backoff
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^caps backoff delay at maxDelayMs$' tests/retry.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: throws_last_error
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^throws the last error after exhausting all attempts$' tests/retry.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: first_success
pass_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^returns immediately on first success$' tests/retry.test.ts
